description: 4 alerts: 2 about OOM kill, 2 about disk space. Should form exactly 2 clusters.

alerts.text: Kernel OOM killer activated. Process redis-server killed (score 892). System memory 99.1%, swap 98% full. Analytics Python job consuming 44% memory.
Out of memory: Kill process python3 (pid 8821). MemoryError allocating 2.1 GiB for batch job. System near memory exhaustion.
Disk usage at 97%. Write operations failing across all services. OSError errno 28 no space left on device. /var/log growing rapidly.
Nginx log rotation failed. access.log is 183GB, no space left on device. File writes failing. Filesystem at capacity.
